ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the firm */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "assignment_number" TEXT /* Assignment number or code */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the assignment belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "parent_assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent assignment (if applicable) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the assignment (high/medium/low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment (open/in_progress/on_hold/closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_parent_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the history entry is for */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the update */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client the project is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (open/in_progress/on_hold/closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_entries" (
  "time_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who performed the work */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the work is for */,
  "week_ending" TEXT /* Date the week ends for the time entry */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked on the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (open/paid/overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item belongs to */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the item is for */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked on the assignment */,
  "rate" REAL /* Hourly rate for the assignment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount for the invoice item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing rate */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the rate applies to */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly billing rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the rate expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_rates_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilization_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_hours" REAL /* Total hours worked by the employee */,
  "billable_hours" REAL /* Total billable hours worked by the employee */,
  "utilization_percentage" REAL /* Utilization percentage of the employee */,
  "target_utilization" REAL /* Target utilization percentage for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilization_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_hours" REAL /* Total hours worked on the project */,
  "billable_hours" REAL /* Total billable hours on the project */,
  "project_profitability" REAL /* Profitability percentage of the project */,
  "budget_variance" REAL /* Budget variance for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the permission is for */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is for */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
